title: One Piece Devil Fruits | Totem CIT
description: This resource pack replaces Totems with different Devil Fruits from One Piece using custom names with CIT.
body:
Ever wanted a second chance at life... powered by a **Devil Fruit**?
This resource pack transforms **Totems of Undying** into Devil Fruits from _One Piece_ using CIT (Custom Item Textures).

Just rename a totem in an anvil to match one of the fruit names shown in the menu below, and watch it transform into the corresponding Devil Fruit!

No need to sail the Grand Line when your powers are only an anvil away.

Fruit artwork by **GoneGozzle.exe** [[Instagram]](https://www.instagram.com/gonegozzle.exe/)

### **If you're playing on a version lower than 1.21.5:**

**The pack requires OptiFine, which can be downloaded here:**

https://optifine.net/home

**If you're playing on Fabric, this pack requires CIT Resewn:**

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cit-resewn

![Menu showing each fruit you can have based on the name you give the totem in an anvil. the quoted names are Japanese alternatives.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6388b901603f68b41ac5cc943c8793ea6875b9e.jpeg)
